zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Atholl於1190年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾布萊爾 阿爾時，她的父親Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia32歲，母親Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl24歲。她於1210年1月與Thomas à Galloway在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克結婚。她去世於1236年8月9日在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾享年46歲。

zh-hans.Haddington, East Lothian, Scotland: 苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Atholl于1190年出生在英国苏格兰培爾布萊爾 阿爾时，她的父亲Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia32岁，母亲Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl24岁。她于1210年1月与Thomas à Galloway在苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克结婚。她去世于1236年8月9日在苏格兰培爾阿爾享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Atholl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Athol
meanings: Scottish: A male name derived from Athol, in Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Atholl was born in 1190, in Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia, was 32 and her mother, Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl, was 24. She married Thomas à Galloway in January 1210, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland. She died on 9 August 1236, in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Atholl est née en 1190, à Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas à Galloway en janvier 1210, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse. Elle est décédée le 9 août 1236, à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Atholl 1190 in Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia 32 und ihre Mutter Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl 24. Sie hat im Januar 1210 in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland Thomas à Galloway geheiratet. Sie starb am 9. August 1236 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Atholl è nata il nel 1190 nel Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Thomas à Galloway nel gennaio 1210, nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland. Morì il 9 agosto 1236, nel Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Athollが1190年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアブレイル アソルで生まれた時，父Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholiaは32歳，母Margaret Comyn Countess Of Athollは24歳であった。1210年1月にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリックでThomas à Gallowayと結婚した。彼女は1236年8月9日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Atholl(이)가 1190년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 블레이르 앳홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1210년 1월 스컷랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 Thomas à Galloway(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1236년 8월 9일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Atholl nasceu em 1190, em Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas à Galloway em janeiro de 1210, em Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland. Ela faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1236, em Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Atholl родилась в 1190 г. в местности блеир атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas à Galloway январь 1210 г. в местности каррикк, аиршир, Шотландия. Она умерла 9 августа 1236 г. в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 46 лет.
